default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting purpose

[Discuss next steps for the Enterprise Accelerator Program following unexpected high interest from applicants.](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Program vastly exceeded expectations: 1200+ sessions, 1000+ users (720 new) in first few days](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Need to define program structure, criteria, and capacity with cross-functional input (e.g., sales, delivery)](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Opportunity to re-engage previously lost customers and target high-quality leads through focused campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

## Topics

### Initial Program Response

  - [1200+ sessions, 1000+ users (720 new) within days of launch](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Landing page linked only from enterprise page, still drew 6 new users](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Struck a chord with potential customers, validating the concept](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

### Program Structure and Next Steps

  - [Repackage existing offerings (e.g., Slack channels for accounts) into a formal program](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Define acceptance criteria, support offerings, and cross-functional involvement](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Potential structure: $100K proof of concept, limited spots available](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Create program details page: timeline, contract process, onboarding, value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)

### Lead Quality and Analysis

  - [Mix of new leads and re-engaged lost customers (e.g., Bona, previously close-lost)](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Need to pull Salesforce data to identify returning leads and their previous status](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [206 total signups so far, with potential for hundreds more](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Campaign Strategy

  - [Treat leads differently from standard sales approach](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Target specific industries (e.g., contact centers) with tailored hypotheses](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Aim for high-quality leads at $300-$500 per lead with budget and intent](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Focus on director-level+ at companies with 4,000-2,000 employees](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Emphasize voice-related interests in targeting](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alexa: Pull Salesforce report on re-engaged leads and send performance overview to Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Marcel: Present findings to e-staff, seek input from Anuke and Chris on program definition](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - Team: Await e-staff feedback to finalize program structure and criteria
  - [Marcel: Develop targeted campaign strategy once alignment is reached](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Josh: Continue monitoring analytics and lead quality](https://fathom.video/share/r5Z_e_nmE37GmscD6Fsq4YG_dUHv7Je3?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

action_items.description: Provide details to populate program page
Pull Salesforce report and send to Marcel
Follow up with Marcel after call regarding next steps
